phase13.1.phaseName: Archive System Foundation and basic Calendar and Schedule
phase13.1.description: Create archive structure with monthly organization and entity archival
deliverables: Create archives/ folder structure with monthly organization
Implement archives/index.json for archived months index
Move Collected tasks to archive with proper status preservation
Move Sold items to archive maintaining final status
Move all records to archive (inherently completed data)
Design and implement Active vs Archive data strategy (filters and views for working set)
Implement the Weekly Schedule, Calendar and Gantt Chart Views in the Control Room
Create the Smart Scheduler
Archive System Refactor, No snapshots, Entites are preserved in their Section by Month

Phase13.2.phaseName: Monthly Logging System, Booth Sales, Contracts and Legal Entities
Phase13.2.description: Implement comprehensive monthly logging for data lifecycle tracking, Contracts and Legal Entities
deliverables: Create Contracts and Legal Entities, Use it in Booth Sales
Create monthly log file structure (tasks-log-MM-YY.json format)
Implement task lifecycle logging (Created, Started, Done)
Implement item lifecycle logging (Created, Moved, Sold)
Implement record lifecycle logging (Created)
Implement financial effects logging with proper categorization
Implement player effects logging for points and achievements
Update logging logic to track complete data lifecycle
Ensure logs track lifecycle events, not current state
Redis Lists and Monthly Keys Refactor

phase13.3.phaseName: Dashboards Section, Month Selectors, Summary Repo, Archive System
phase13.3.description: Implement month/year selectors and connect it to Archive System and Dashboards Section
deliverables: Archive Section Set for historical data viewing
Add Month Selector to Financials Section for monthly financials
Test month switching functionality across all sections
Ensure proper data isolation between current and historical views
Create Basic Dashboard Section and prepare to visualize data across all sections
Dashboard & Archive Integration and their Month Selectors
Dashboard connectivity with all other sections, Summary Repos
Refactor and Standarization of Month Selector, Refactor DashboardTabs and Data Patterns Optimization

phase13.4.phaseName: Monthly close workflow and many bug fixing all around
phase13.4.description: Monthly Close Wrokkflow, Automation Tasks, Multiple Bug Fixing, thegame DB namespace
deliverables: Montly Close Automation Task, Automation Tree
Booth Sales Multiple Bugs and Refactors
Done Tasks Workflow Refactor, Collected Tasks Workflow Refactor, Items Sold, Auth Hybrid Login
Basic Badges and Achievements Creation in Player Progression
Implement Strict Key Namespacing and DB thegame namespace Migration
Refactor to Stateless Edge Auth and Rate Limit for Bandwidth Protection
Align the 'Digital Universe' Middleware and Packages to connect TheGame, Pixelbrain and Akiles-Ecosystem

phaseX.1.status: Implement automation tasks, Connect to 'Pixelbrain' AI agents and MCP
deliverables: Define and Develop 'Pixel Brain', a 'Manager Agent' to Manage a Set of 'AI Agents'
Create one AI Agent for Time Planning, one for Prepare classes and one for Tasks Organization
Create one AI Marketing Agent to Manage Social Media Apps, Marketing Campaings and Content Creation
Create one AI Agent for Data Analysis and Reporting of Business Data with Performance Metrics
Create one AI Agent for Game Design improvements, Player Analysis and UX, Game Balance and Game Mechanics
Create a set of Automations: Voice to Text. Image to Text, Text to Speech, PDF Converter, Image Creator
Implement Monthly Close Automation Task (orchestrates archiving of all completed entities)
Implement automated monthly summary generation and analysis based on archive data (post Monthly Close)
Create one AI Agent for Data Integrity Validation that checks: Link consistency across all entity relationships
The Agent must checkCollected/Sold status consistency, Month index accuracy, Archive snapshot completeness

phaseX.2.status: Complete Maps Section, Improve UI and Gameplay (Player and Personas)
deliverables: Make the Map and Sites visible with GoogleMap
Define if to Create Events Tab in the Control Room
Connect Events to the system and Manage Events, tracking Tasks and Items sales in a specific timeframe
Events temporarily take over regular workflow during time-bound campaigns (e.g. Special Week Sale)
JungleCoins and its equivalent (Usd) Produced, visible in the Dashboard and Player Section
Personal Finances well conected to Player Points and Personal Earnings
Basic Badges and Achievements systems improved

phaseX.3.phaseName: Debug and Optimize every aspect of the TheGame V0.1
deliverables: Network Sales System
Clean ad Update All the Spread Documentation
